title: FAIR HOUSING ENFORCEMENT COLLABORATIVE - 211info
text: EL PROGRAMA HISPANO CATÓLICO FAIR HOUSING ENFORCEMENT COLLABORATIVE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about tenant rights and refers cases requiring legal advice or representation to attorneys at Legal Aid Services of Oregon, Fair Housing Council of Oregon, and Oregon Law Center. Also includes culturally-specific case workers located in geographically underserved areas. Also conducts outreach and tenant rights education in the community. 333 SE 223rd Avenue Suite 100 Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 669-8350 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 669-8350 Main phone (503) 232-4448 Hotline UNICA Crisis Line/Linea de Crisis UNICA Reception (503) 669-8350 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for information. Can leave a voicemail if outside of regular hours. FEES: None for screening. Fees for legal services at partner agencies vary. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah and Clackamas Counties Services: Eviction Prevention Assistance Legal Information Services * Tenants Specialized Information and Referral * Tenants Tenant Rights Information/Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD JUSTICE HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY RENT ASSISTANCE PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - EVICTION PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - HOME FINDER SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH AND FAMILY EDUCATION ENGAGEMENT PREK-12 INFORMATION SERVICES - INFORMATION AND REFERRAL MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - UNICA UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EL PROGRAMA HISPANO CATÓLICO
